features: LIME BASIL AND MANDARIN WAX MELTS - Notes of peppery basil and aromatic white thyme which brings an unexpected twist to the scent of limes on a Caribbean breeze.

HIGHLY SCENTED WAX MELTS – All of our Wax Melts & Candles are highly scented. We believe it’s always nice to be able to actually smell the intense fragrance around the whole room, rather than only where the melter is burning

100% ECO SOY WAX [CRUELTY & VEGAN FREE] – All of our products are made with 100% Eco Soy Wax. They are completely Cruelty & Vegan Free. LARGE RANGE OF FRAGRANCES – Here at Hampshire Candles, we stock a large range of Wax Melts & Candles. In fact, we have over 80 different fragrances for you to choose from, all made by hand in Hampshire. View our Amazon Store for our full selection of fragrances.

MADE FOR MORE THAN ONE USE! – We produce all our Wax Melts with simplicity in mind. When you open your new purchase, simply use one or two squares. Add it to your wax burner and start enjoying your fragrance. You’ll still have remaining wax for future use!

IMPORTANT NOTICE – We do try our best to pack the products as best we can but due to the nature of the product (being fragile). On rare occasions, the Wax Melts may break. This will not affect the quality of the product and they will burn just as well. All items are CLP compliant with safety & warning provided. All of our wax melts are made in small batches and so colour and appearance may vary between batches.
description: Product Description HAMSPHIRE CANDLES & HAMPSHIRE SCENT COMPANY HANDMADE HOME FRAGRANCE PRODUCTS Hampshire Candles Here at Hampshire Candles, we stock a large range of Wax Melts, Candles, Reed Diffusers, and Room Sprays. In fact, we have over 100 different fragrances for you to choose from, all made by hand in Hampshire. How To Use Wax Melts Place the wax into the well of your Wax Melter. Light an unscented tealight underneath and experience the highly scented wax. We always recommend burning your Wax Melts four hours at a time. Wax Melts can be melted and re-melted over and over again until the Wax Melt stops providing the fragrance scent. These Wax Melts can be used with Tea light and electric Wax Burners. (When using an electric warmer we recommend a 40-60W bulb). Why Choose Hampshire Candles? Made With Love Our products are handmade in our unit in Abbots Ann, Hampshire. We enjoy making quality highly scented products for your home. Quality Ingredients All of our candles and wax melts are made using natural eco soy wax, which leads to a clean and easy melt. We put the maximum amount of oil into our products that the wax will hold to ensure a strong scented product. We Love What We Do We love making home fragranced products but are also conscious about the packing and how they are presented. All of our wax melts are poured into moulds and are then put into bags and hand labelled. Makes The Perfect Little Gift All of our products are made with Love making them the ideal gift for friends, family and loved ones. Our snap bars are the perfect letterbox gift for ease of delivery so why not send a thinking of you gift. Lime Basil and Mandarin Wax Melt English Pear and Freesia Wax Melts Blackberry and Bay Wax Melts Thai Lime and Mango Wax Melts Peony and Blush Wax Melts Basil and Neroli Wax Melts Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 3.8 out of 5 stars 32 4.0 out of 5 stars 45 4.2 out of 5 stars 5 3.9 out of 5 stars 5 3.0 out of 5 stars 13 4.1 out of 5 stars 6 Price £4.99 £ 4 . 99 £4.99 £ 4 . 99 £4.99 £ 4 . 99 £3.99 £ 3 . 99 £4.99 £ 4 . 99 £4.99 £ 4 . 99 Scent Notes of peppery basil and aromatic white thyme which brings an unexpected twist to the scent of limes on a Caribbean breeze. Similar in notes and identity to the popular scent. English Pear & Freesia features pear which is combined with quince which introduces honey sweetness and is surrounded with white freesia and wild climbing rose. Our Blackberry & Bay is similar in notes and identity to the popular scent. Blackberry & Bay features grapefruit, floral notes, vetiver, cedar, a burst of blackberry juice, and bay leaf. A fresh tropical fruity fragrance opening with lemons, lime, cassis, pineapple, mango and passion fruit, supported by a heart of peach, apricot, and plum, resting on a base of musk and dry fruits. Similar scent to the well known fragrance, this scent features peonies in bloom with red apple and an abundance of jasmine, rose, and gillyflower. Under notes of suede. A very sumptuous and intimate scent. This sophisticated scent starts with the herbaceous warm top notes of basil with nuances of mandarin, adding a twist to the citrus and green floral notes of the neroli. Bring the scnet of the spa into your home. Soy Wax ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Vegan and Cruelty Free ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Use on Tealight and Electric Burners ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Weight Approx 50g Approx 50g Approx 50g Approx 50g Approx 50g Approx 50g
